name: Advisor
instructions:
+1 Action
Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. The player to your left chooses one of them. Discard that card and put the 
rest into your hand.

name: Bag of Gold
instructions:
+1 Action
Gain a Gold onto your deck.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Baker
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+1 Coffers
-----
Setup: Each player gets +1 Coffers.

name: Butcher
instructions:
+2 Coffers
You may trash a card from your hand, to gain a card, costing up to $1 more than it per Coffers you spend.

name: Candlestick Maker
instructions:
+1 Action
+1 Buy
+1 Coffers

name: Carnival
instructions: Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put one of each differently named card into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Coronet
instructions:
You may play a non-Reward Action from your hand twice.
You may play a non-Reward Treasure from your hand twice.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Courser
instructions:
Choose two different options: +2 Cards; +2 Actions; +$2; gain 4 Silvers.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Demesne
instructions:
+2 Actions
+2 Buys
Gain a Gold.
-----
Worth 1 VP per Gold you have.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Diadem
instructions:
$2
+$1 per unused Action you have (Action, not Action card).
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Doctor
instructions:
Name a card. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Trash the matches. Put the rest back in any order.
-----
Overpay: Per $1 overpaid, look at the top card of your deck; trash it, discard it, or put it back.

name: Fairgrounds
instructions: Worth 2 VP per 5 differently named cards you have (round down).

name: Farmhands
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
-----
When you gain this, you may set aside an Action or Treasure from your hand, and play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Farming Village
instructions:
+2 Actions
Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Treasure or Action card. Put that card into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Farrier
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+1 Buy
-----
Overpay: +1 Card at the end of this turn per $1 overpaid.

name: Ferryman
instructions:
+2 Cards
+1 Action
Discard a card.
-----
Setup: Choose an unused Kingdom card pile costing $3 or $4. Gain one when you gain a Ferryman.

name: Followers
instructions:
+2 Cards
Gain an Estate. Each other player gains a Curse and discards down to 3 cards in hand.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Footpad
instructions:
+2 Coffers
Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.
-----
In games using this, when you gain a card in an Action phase, +1 Card.

name: Fortune Teller
instructions:
+$2
Each other player reveals cards from the top of their deck until they reveal a Victory card or a Curse. They put it on top and discard the rest.

name: Hamlet
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
You may discard a card for +1 Action. You may discard a card for +1 Buy.

name: Harvest
instructions: Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck, then discard them. +$1 per differently named card revealed.

name: Herald
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an Action, play it.
-----
Overpay: Per $1 overpaid, put any card from your discard pile onto your deck.

name: Horn of Plenty
instructions: Gain a card costing up to $1 per differently named card you have in play (counting this). If it's a Victory card, trash this.

name: Horse Traders
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$3
Discard 2 cards.
-----
When another player plays an Attack card, you may first set this aside from your hand. If you do, then at the start of your next turn, +1 Card and return this to your hand.

name: Housecarl
instructions:
+1 Card per differently named Action card you have in play.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Huge Turnip
instructions:
+2 Coffers
+$1 per Coffers you have.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Hunting Party
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal your hand. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a card that isn't a copy of one in your hand. Put it into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Infirmary
instructions:
+1 Card
You may trash a card from your hand.
-----
Overpay: Play this once per $1 overpaid.

name: Jester
instructions:
+$2
Each other player discards the top card of their deck. If it's a Victory card they gain a Curse; otherwise they gain a copy of the discarded card or you do, your choice.

name: Journeyman
instructions: Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 3 cards without that name. Put those cards into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Joust
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+$1
You may set aside a Province from your hand to gain any Reward to your hand. Discard the Province in Clean-up.

name: Masterpiece
instructions:
$1
-----
Overpay: Gain a Silver per $1 overpaid.

name: Menagerie
instructions:
+1 Action
Reveal your hand. If the revealed cards all have different names, +3 Cards. Otherwise, +1 Card.

name: Merchant Guild
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$1
At the end of your Buy phase this turn, +1 Coffers per card you gained in it.

name: Plaza
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
You may discard a Treasure for +1 Coffers.

name: Princess
instructions:
+1 Buy
This turn, cards cost $2 less.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Remake
instructions: Do this twice: Trash a card from your hand, then gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Renown
instructions:
+1 Buy
This turn, cards cost $2 less.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Shop
instructions:
+1 Card
+$1
You may play an Action card from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play.

name: Soothsayer
instructions: Gain a Gold. Each other player gains a Curse, and if they did, draws a card.

name: Stonemason
instructions:
Trash a card from your hand. Gain 2 cards each costing less than it.
-----
Overpay: Gain 2 Action cards each costing the amount overpaid.

name: Taxman
instructions: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards a copy of it (or reveals they can't). Gain a Treasure onto your deck costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Tournament
instructions:
+1 Action
Each player may reveal a Province from their hand. If you do, discard it and gain any Prize (from the Prize pile) or a Duchy, onto your deck. If no-one else does, +1 Card and +$1.

name: Trusty Steed
instructions:
Choose two: +2 Cards; or +2 Actions; or +$2; or gain 4 Silvers and put your deck into your discard pile. The choices must be different.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Young Witch
instructions:
+2 Cards
Discard 2 cards. Each other player gains a Curse unless they reveal a Bane from their hand.
-----
Setup: Add an extra Kingdom card pile costing $2 or $3 to the Supply. Its cards are Banes.
